case_title: DWIGHT ALEXANDER VS. DONALD LEBUHN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DONALD LEBUHN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-11-2008 AT 8:30AM.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, DWIGHT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-22-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EVOLUTION HOME FURNISHINGS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY ALEXANDER, DWIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT LEBUHN, DONALD EVOLUTION HOME FURNISHINGS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-22-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEBUHN, DONALD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-11-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, DWIGHT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVOLUTION HOME FURNISHINGS $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $132.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,382.50, DEFENDANT DONALD LEBUHN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - AVAILABLE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
